Blue Crystal Staff  
 

Lore Item No Trade Quest Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 1H Blunt Atk Delay: 35
DMG: 10 Dmg Bonus: 35
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
INT: +10 HP: +10 MANA: +30
SV FIRE: +20 SV COLD: +20
WT: 0.6 Size: MEDIUM
Class: WIZ
Race: HUM ERU HIE DEF GNM FRG DRK
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)
Blue Crystal Staff
Lore Item No Trade Quest Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 1H Blunt Atk Delay: 35
DMG: 10 Dmg Bonus: 35
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
INT: +10 HP: +10 MANA: +30
SV FIRE: +20 SV COLD: +20
WT: 0.6 Size: MEDIUM
Class: WIZ
Race: HUM ERU HIE DEF GNM FRG DRK
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Item Lore:The power of Solusek Ro radiates from this item
Item Type:1H Blunt
Light:Torch
Stackable:No
Submitted By:Alderon
Lucy Entry By:Kerasota
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-15 20:32:59
Page Updated:Fri Jun 7th, 2024

Expansion: Original
Rarity: Very Rare
Level to Attain: 46
[Drops | Quests | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Kedge Keep
NPC Name
Phinigel Autropos

Quests

This item is used in quests.
Expansion List - Premium only.

Temple of Solusek Ro
Quest Name
Wizard Epic: Staff of the Four

Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Kedge Keep
You may also hail a harbinger of the seas in Kedge Keep to spawn a loot-locked version of Phinigel Autropos that will only drop the Blue Crystal Staff.


Uploaded November 27th, 2008
Send a correction

MQ in 2024
QuoteReply
# May 30 2024 at 4:04 PM Rating: Decent
Morlaeth
Scholar
73 posts
Successful MQ in 2024 using the "invis trick". MQer handed the Phinny stick in invis and I handed the other staves. Worked.
▲ Page top
MQ Information As Of 2014
QuoteReply
# Mar 29 2014 at 8:37 AM Rating: Decent
VonsneerTheScoundrel
Scholar
39 posts
Ok So I did this MQ for my Guildmate on 03/29/2014. I had it on my level 90 bard. True spirit faction was not up to par so Arantir would not accept my trade. I stood behind him, and had to HIDE & SNEAK to get him to take it. Now i'm not sure if just one will work, HIDE might work by itself. But I used both and he accepted it just fine, and then my guildmate turned in the other 2 staffs and got the final piece she needed.
____________________________
[img]http://eq.sig.magelo.com/2672519.png[/img]

Does the MQ still work?

Also does the MQ'er have to have a certain amount of faction with Arantir?

Only reason I am asking these question is because I had a friend try to MQ the blue crystal staff, but Arantir just gave it back to her.

How much to MQ?
QuoteReply
# Mar 08 2008 at 8:42 AM Rating: Decent
Narpok
View User Forum
Scholar
342 posts
To MQ the Blue Crystal Staff, have the person with the BCS shroud into rogue form. The quester and the MQer then meet in Halas. The quester then spawns the turn in NPC. The MQer enters hide & sneak and turns in the staff. Then the quester hands in his portions.

MQ complete. ;)
▲ Page top
Phinny

1 post
I was lucky i suppose.. got staff off this dude after first kill. 65 pally and Bard with 61 wiz. pally and bard lost 1% hp each.. complete overkill!!! But dont take a chance have a good tank and you should be fine for him.Now all i need is golem hehe so close :)

61th Level Sorceror

I got super lucky and thanks To Elza guild
QuoteReply
# Oct 25 2003 at 8:20 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591794792904
31 posts
Ok this is a funny one but first let me thank Elza guild. For what? let me tell you. I was going after my BCS on Veeshan server and my guild killed him once in the afternoonbwith no drop so I camped him. I fell alseep because I woke up and saw that I had died....no biggie except I was bound on ledge in Phinnys room...underwater. Well I had gone from almost 58 to 53. Then Elza guild shows up Rezzes me while killing Phinny when he popped and gave me the Blue Crystal Staff. So I was very lucky got staff on second try and back up to 57. Thank you Elza, I can't say it enough.

Mystereon Deathfinder 57 (again) Wizzie
▲ Page top
Pulling
QuoteReply
# Jun 26 2003 at 7:49 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592255258681
15 posts
I've single pulled Phinny with this technique, I'm sure others know as well but if you're a Wizard, Bind yourself to the ledge, then send your eye down there to target phinny, then invis up and swim down into the room on the opposite side of where Phinny be, Get down to the bottm of the cave. Then with Phinny being still targeted, just root him(he'll resist anyways) and immediately GATE. You might get hit or might not. Once you gate back to the ledge, Phinny himself just appears and you and your group can take him out. And BTW, this must be one of the worst camps to get Epic pieces... I've heard of people killing this dude of up to 20 times just to get their piece... He's about a 12 hour respawn.
▲ Page top
RE: Pulling
QuoteReply
# Jul 11 2005 at 7:14 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591822565228
30 posts
Also you can bind at zone in. Trot down to phinny, use an eye to target him. Then swim to the very top of his room and aggro. I usually use my flux staff or annul magic, then gate. If you aggro him when he is at the center highest point of his room you'll get like one seahorse add that's it. I duo'd him about an hour ago this way. 65 wizard, and 70 cleric, was pie.

Unfortuneatly he didn't drop a staff. So I'm going back this evening and we'll see what happens.
▲ Page top
RE: Pulling
QuoteReply
# Jun 27 2003 at 12:51 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1671409090227
View User Forum
Scholar
222 posts
Have attempted Phinny 4 times. First 1 was a success with about 12 peeps, next 2 were success with Rng-65, Wiz-65, Clr-62, Mag-64 and Wiz-55. Last one was with about 20 peeps with the Wiz-65, and the max of the rest was 56, and we died on Phinny twice. Didn't realise Seahorses respawned so fast and we didn't have time for only cleric to med up. We wasted a lot of mana on seahorses and were fairly disorganised.
(By "success", I mean we killed Phinny, no Wiz staff dropped yet.)
----------------------------------------------

There is a post under the Gnarled Staff that says someone killed Phinny 67 times before he dropped the Blue Crystal Staff.

Anyone had a harder time than that yet?

# Oct 02 2003 at 7:42 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1671409090227
View User Forum
Scholar
222 posts
Hehe, hadn't seen your post at the time.

Got him last night. Just lulled the seahorses, and SK pulled Phinny. We had a full group of 58 -65 with no healer (Ranger don't count =P). 63 Chanter hasted us, and lulled guards.
I don't think anyone got as low as 90pct health.

That's about 7 kills and no wizzie staff.
▲ Page top
RE: Pulling
QuoteReply
# Jan 02 2004 at 12:34 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1671409090227
View User Forum
Scholar
222 posts
Lost count. I think I'm up to 9 attempts now and no staff.

But, the Seahorses can now see invis. I'm sure this is a change. I have never seen any capable of seeing invis before.

I went with a mage, and 3 of the 4 Seahorses could see invis, we killed them, but too slow and they were respawning before I could drag Phinny out. So we had to kill another Seahorse.

2 Guardians spawned down in Phinnys room. And now only 1 of the 4 seahorses could see invis after the respawns.

PERHAPS Phinny is casting See invis buff on them. Not sure.

Edited, Fri Jan 2 00:57:44 2004
▲ Page top
MQable Wizard Staff
QuoteReply
# Jun 24 2003 at 3:25 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592256107696
1 post
Please be very careful about attempting to MQ any of the wizard staffs. I attempted this recently. A friend of mine *a druid* had the blue crystal staff he was holding for me for MQ. When I finally got both of the other staffs, we headed for Halas to do the MQ. The druid DID NOT have the faction needed for the turn in, and Arantir ate all three staves. I spent approximately a week petitioning to attempt to get my staves back. Normally, a GM will not give back items lost during an MQ attempt, but the one I spoke with was very nice, and gave me my two staves back. Please be careful about MQing.
▲ Page top
RE: MQable Wizard Staff
QuoteReply
# Jan 25 2004 at 3:52 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593375035899
532 posts
For the love of god you do NOT need True Spirit faction for the quest. Open trade window, have someone cast invis on you, then hit the trade button and you are fine. For MQ just have 3 people in the group with the 3rd non MQ person being one that has the invis spell. Stop wasting staves...

Liveye (lvl 65 Wizard)

Woot

# May 23 2003 at 5:00 PM Rating: Default

Sorry about this, but I went to Kedge with my ranger friend to see if he was up, he was, but level 60's were camping him. They didn't need the peice, so they invited us to join. He dropped it. I did VS two days earlier and got that peice on the first kill. Now on to Fear as soon as possible.

Drop Rate
QuoteReply
# May 19 2003 at 6:04 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591784212454
9 posts
I just want to say that I am sick of this camp! I have killed Phinny more than 10 time (lost count) the fact that this guy has like 4 epic pieces on him makes it a pain in the *** to camp since the only times that I have heard of this staff dropping there were no wizzies there to loot the thing. I started camping him at lvl 50 and now at 59 I STILL don't have this drop. Well I just wanted to ***** a little bit to let anyone who is thinking that this camp would be quick...well it isn't.

▲ Page top
HERE IS THE METHOD!
QuoteReply
# Mar 28 2003 at 7:35 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591783238992
166 posts
Ok, I don't care if everyone knows this or not. Here is the no fail method of pulling Phinigel Autropos! Get a lvl 65 paladin or close, if they are lower than 65 without the HoTs and great ability to heal themselves then bring along another person who is a healer.

Anyway, gather at least one other person who needs the epic piece, preferably mage/wizard combo is nice. Now get to the ledge, after you're there the mage or wizard sends an Eye of Tallon out into phinigel's lair to get a target on him.
The paladin will then proceed to swim in targetting distance of each of the 4 swirlspine seahorses and cast pacify on them. The second the last one is pacified the paladin will target the person with phinigel on target, assist, and boom pull with a spell such as stun since he is immune.

I have done this twice and it was a single pull both times the first try and both were successful kills. And to top it off I have my Blue Crystal Staff because of it. :p You do not need anyone who isn't a paladin or healer on this one, just bring whoever needs the epic piece and at most a paladin and a healer (ie. 58+ shaman / druid or a 56 cleric) because any extra will just create more aggro to throw around and ***** things up. Good luck getting your staves wizards...

Liveye (lvl 60 Wizard Ayonae Ro)

PS- Heh if anyone, like me, has a short friend list all other methods suck badly. Please use this method so we can get phinny in an out as quickly as possible and get him dropping more staves.
▲ Page top

RE: Cheating Way!!
QuoteReply
# Sep 22 2002 at 7:54 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591774962392
150 posts
This post just came up from a deep part of my brain. And thought id post this, NOT to prove the guy that claims Killing Solo will get you the staffs, but to inform ppl about the faction thing.

From the Sept 4 2002 patch.

- There is a fellow named Moltak in Sol Temple. Killing him gives a negative faction adjustment with the True Spirit faction. BUT, if you have a very, very bad faction with True Spirit, killing him will also reset your faction to a more tolerable level. So don't mess with this fellow unless folks on the True Spirit faction are willing to kill you on sight.
- Made some modifications to the faction effects of the Wizard Epic quest.
▲ Page top
